title: Mar Mar's Enhanced Ore Variety
description: Bored of finding always the same ores? You just found a solucion.  This mod adds a Granite, Diorite,  Andesite and Tuff variant to all the vanilla ores.
body:
## Title
With **_Mar Mar's Enhanced Ore Variety_**, the underworld of Minecraft has become a little more colorful and fun to play.
![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1ad630f2-4310-4ff9-bff3-7d4732d85be7.png)

***
## Main additions
- New variants to all the vanilla blocks (including emeralds).
- No changes to the **_vanilla ore generation_**.
- The new ores generates like if Mojang did this mod (they never would do a thing like this).
***
## Credits
- Thanks to [Junshengxie](https://www.curseforge.com/members/junshengxie/projects) for chinese localizaton.
***
## Legal information
- This mod uses the MIT license.
- You can use this mod on any modpack, as long as you give credits to the authors.
